text: How do you usually create passwords?

options.text: I reuse the same password everywhere
I use small changes to the same password
I create different passwords for important accounts
I use a password manager with strong unique passwords
No, I do not use it
Only when a website forces me
Yes, on my important accounts
Yes, with an authenticator app or security key

text: What do you do before clicking a suspicious link?

options.text: I click it if it looks interesting
I check the message quickly
I check the sender and link preview
I verify the source before opening anything

text: How do you handle app permissions?

options.text: I allow whatever the app asks for
I allow permissions if the app seems safe
I deny permissions that feel unnecessary
I regularly review and remove unnecessary permissions

text: How often do you update your apps and devices?

options.text: Almost never
Only when something stops working
Every now and then
Regularly, especially security updates

text: How do you use public Wi-Fi?

options.text: I log into anything normally
I avoid banking but use other accounts
I avoid sensitive accounts on public Wi-Fi
I use mobile data or a trusted VPN for sensitive tasks

text: How much personal info do you share on social media?

options.text: A lot, including location and daily details
Some personal details without thinking much
I avoid sharing sensitive information
I share very little and check privacy settings

text: What do you do when a website asks to save your card or login details?

options.text: I save them for convenience
I save them on websites I use often
I avoid saving sensitive details on most websites
I use trusted tools and avoid saving details randomly

text: How do you check if a website is trustworthy?

options.text: I do not check
I check if it looks professional
I check the URL and HTTPS lock
I check the URL, HTTPS, reputation, and warning signs

text: How do you deal with old accounts you no longer use?

options.text: I leave them as they are
I forget about them unless there is a problem
I delete some old accounts when I remember
I regularly delete or secure unused accounts
